      • Powered By

        • Possibility Management Processes

          ...a process is the path of shifting from one shape of Being to another shape of Being.

          A Possibility Management authentic adulthood healing or initiatory Process

          expands that part in you able to take responsibility

          and be more consciously aware.

          Clearly, between one solid shape and a new solid shape there will be a liquid state.

          Once your Being actually changes shape, so many new things are Possible

          because the Universe (E.C.C.O.) is forced to interact with your Being's new shape.

          Possibility Management processes for healing, initiation, and transformation have been empirically developed by small teams of Edgeworkers, Riftwalkers, and Possibilitators throughout Europe and the Americas since 1975.

          These processes do not originate from the traditional Western psychoanalytical context of Freud and Jung. Nor do they originate from indigenous traditions, or the Eastern enlightenment traditions, or from any religious or spiritual belief system such as the cathartic processes taught by Osho Shri Rajneesh.

          These processes use distinctions, thoughtmaps, and thoughtware from the archetypal context of radical responsibility out of which Possibility Management emerges. These are authentic adulthood initiations from archiarchy, the culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course. They make intelligent use of both feelings and emotions (which are radically different from each other...) in processes of cathexis. Cathexis does not imagine that if you fully express emotions they go away. Cathexis uses the intelligence and energy of feelings and emotions for healing, initiations, transformation, and adventure.

          While upgrading your Thoughtware, or being healed or initiated in Possibility Management, both Distinctions and Thoughtmaps are used .

          Many Possibility Management Distinctions are available online at The Distinctionary (http://distinctionary.xyz).

          Many Possibility Management Thoughtmaps are available in books, articles, podcasts, trainings, and the PM Thoughtmaps website (http://pmthoughtmaps.mystrikingly.com).

          You can subscribe to a free weekly email with a random S.P.A.R.K. experiment (Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge) here: http://sparks-english.mystrikingly.com/#subscribe-to-sparks.

          The collection of Possibility Management Processes on this website may prove exceedingly useful in next-culture context-shift, evolutionary, and change-agent professions such as:

          • Adulthood (adulthood.mystrikingly.com)
          • Initiations (initiations.org)
          • Emotional Body Healing (feelingspractitioner.com)
          • Refugees (newrefugees.org)
          • Whole Permaculture (wholepermaculture.org)
          • Circular Meeting Technologies (torustechnology.org)
          • Gameworld Building (gameworldbuilder.org)
          • Culture Shift Bridge Building (becomeabridge.mystrikingly.com)
          • Ecovillages (ecovillage.org)
          • Nanonations (nanonations.org)
          • Possibility Villages (villaging.mystrikingly.com)
          • Possibility Coaching (possibilitycoaching.org)
          • Possibility Mediation (possibilitymediation.org)
          • Possibility Psychology (possibilitypsychology.org)

          StartOver.xyz

          NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code PMPROCES.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

        • Effective Transformational Processes

          CONDITIONS INDICATING THAT A PROCESS COULD BE USEFUL

          We have found different causes for emotional Reactivity which can be transformed through the proper and complete use of Possibility Management Processes:

          1. A 'Button' on your Box (your psychological defense strategy).
          2. A 'Hook' sent by someone else's Gremlin to wake up your Gremlin for a Gremlin feeding frenzy.
          3. A 'Trigger Phrase' in your head that you use to open up a door for a demon to take over and eat your life energy for a while.
          4. An 'Trauma' - an unhealed / incomplete trauma being restimulated in one or more of your 5 Bodies.
          5. A 'Retrieval' is a condition in which a person has sent away a piece of their energetic body and the person is ready to retrieve and re-integrate it.
          6. A 'Banishment' is a condition in which a person is carrying something extra that is no longer needed and which is ready to be sent away, such as an energetic Block, a 'Rider', an assumption, a resentment, a story, etc.
          7. A 'Matrix Building Practice' which builds out the condition in which a person wants to create some aspect of a project but is not able to because they have not built the Matrix yet. The process or initiation leads to a new practice for that person
          8. A 'Hidden Competing Commitment' which is consistently served but which creates results that are contrary or at least very different from the hoped-for outcomes.
          9. A 'Memetic Construct' which imprisons the Client in a minuscule portion of their inner world, which may be familiar and seem 'safe' or 'controllable' but which blocks the Client from their true potential and inner spaciousness.
          10. A 'Survival Strategy' built out of behaviors that force a Client to remain in a survival / scarcity / competition relationship towards the world rather than a relationship of abundant creative collaborative living rich in love.

          Sometimes several conditions arise in combination. If something is not immediately changing by addressing one of the conditions, try looking for what else it is combined with and starting over.

          4 PARTS OF A COMPLETE PROCESS

          We have found that there are 4 distinct components in a complete process to empower people to get out of an emotional reaction and back into the present. Make sure to deliver all 4 components of each process.

          1. Upgraded Thoughtware - clarity about each distinction in a new thoughtmap.
          2. A completed adulthood and radically-responsible emotional healing process such as the initiations given in this website.
          3. Simple new practices - clearly understanding the context and delivery of new practices so that they easefully integrate into your daily life because doing things the old way is simply too painful. Doing practices... as in 'a life of practice', not just understanding practices or thinking about doing practices...
          4. Enough matrix to hold the other three - in other words, enough matrix to hold the results created by the new practices, enough matrix to hold the awareness and consciousness of the new shape of your Being, enough matrix to do the new jobs that ECCO (Earth Coincidence Control Office) will give you to match your new shape of Being.

          For example, you may understand a Distinction or a new Practice in your mind, but that will be useless unless you have built enough Matrix in your Being to be Present to the Distinction, to actually live as the newly activated Distinction, to source the Distinction in any Space.

           

          In other words, as you have probably already discovered and observed, it is not enough for Healing or Transformation to occur that your intellect understands something new. Change occurs through becoming something new.

          WRITING UP HEALING AND TRANSFORMATION PROCESSES

          We have been learning the long hard slow painful way that documenting Processes is a central contribution to the transformational and healing arts of Possibility Management. This is how we share the Treasure with each other, which empowers Edgeworker and Bridge Builder Evolutionaries to do their work building next culture - archiarchy - the human culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course.

           

          Many Processes have been used and never documented, so they are largely lost. This is disrespectful of the Source, to receive the gift but not pass it on.

           

          Many Processes are being use that have not yet been documented. You can document new Processes. HERE is a blank Possibility Management Process Write-Up Form to use. After writing up your Process, please email it to Anne-Chloé Destremau. Thank you for collaborating to build out this gameworld.

           

          Every write-up should specifically answer the following questions for a complete Process Write-Up:

           

          1. PHYSICAL SET-UP What are the physical requirements of time and space set-up?
          2. TIME SPECIFICATIONS How long will the Process take altogether? How much time per person?
          3. FORMULATION Is the Process done by the whole group at the same time? Or in pairs? Or groups of 3 or 5 or 7?
          4. POSITION Standing? Sitting? Lying down?
          5. MATERIALS What materials are needed? e.g. tissues, buckets, towels, flipcharts, other materials for TPP Healing Processes (technopenuriaphobia)
          6. THOUGHTMAPS Which Thoughtmaps are needed to map out the territory to be explored?
          7. CONTEXT What Distinctions are needed to establish the Context of the Space in which this Process does its work?
          8. SUPPLEMENTAL LINKS Please provide links to video or audio recordings of this Process actually being delivered.
          9. BEGINNING What are the exact Scripted words to Start the Process? Having the exact Script for what the Trainer says may be crucial for successful delivery of the Process. The true Script comes from the Archetypal Source Of The Process. When the Script is delivered using these precise powerful words they will take everyone in the Space back to the Source Space from which the Process originally emerged so they can have the original experience - unedited by Box or Gremlin.
          10. NAVIGATING What are the exact Scripted words to Navigate the Process?
          11. COACHING What are the exact Scripted words to Coach the Process?
          12. WRAP-UP What are the exact Scripted words to Wrap Up the Process? Discussion questions? Are Holdings needed?

          COPYLEFT OPEN-CODE THOUGHTWARE AND A SERIOUS WARNING

          The entire body of work from Possibility Management is open-code thoughtware. It is copyleft. This means it cannot be copyrighted, ever. All of the Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, Processes, etc., are brought forth to feed the creative commons of humanity at large. Anything of value that we discover, formulate, or invent upgrades the morphogenetic field of the human race for creating a bright future for all Beings everyone.

           

          Specifically: All of Possibility Management is protected by a Creative Commons Attribution Share Alike 4.0 International License.

           

          However! You should be well and thoroughly warned about one thing:

           

          This copyleft does NOT protect you from being radically and irrevocably responsible for whatever you do with this stuff.

           

          Do you play with dynamite? (No.)

           

          Then don't play with these Authentic Adulthood Healing and Transformational Processes.

           

          Irresponsibility is an illusion.

           

          These Processes are available for use by thoroughly-trained and fully-competent certified Possibility Management Trainers.

           

          If you want training in how to deliver these Processes, please consider joining Possibilitator Training where you will do one or more Expand The Box trainings plus ten or more Possibility Labs with various Possibility Management Trainers around the world. In Possibilitator Training you will join fellow Edgeworkers in a practical, next-culture source-person training. You have a piece of the puzzle for what needs to come into existence for archiarchy to fly. Are you delivering it yet?

           

          Possibilitator Training is a fabulous global community of Edgeworkers, Riftwalkers, Trainers, Healers, Next Culture Seeds, Gameworld Builders, Authentic Adulthood Initiators, and all-around wonderful people.

           

          We welcome you!

          Back Forecasting (see also: Far Fetching)

          attention.mystrikingly.com

          Back Forecasting Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          To utilize the mind's imaginative time-mobility to bypass unknown conditions and start from a conclusion, namely assuming the goal has already been accomplished. Then step by step we work backwards from the future to the present, in the process discovering how it came to pass.

          Also see: splityourattention.mystrikingly.com, becomemagic.mystrikingly.com and magetraining.mystrikingly.com

          Centering The Being

          centeringthebeing.mystrikingly.com

          It is necessary that the Client begin this Process with a sincere and non-intellectual request for a Process which includes a sharing something like the following:

          • "My worldview is confusing me."
          • "My belief-system is interfering in my life."
          • "My Survival Strategy seems to have an agenda that is different from my true wishes."
          • "My GamePlan is running me in circles."
          • "I do not sense being in alignment with my own life."

          When the Client says this, they will feel an Emotion.

          Communication Skills

          listenings.mystrikingly.com

          speakings.mystrikingly.com

          Communication Skills - DOWNLOAD PDF

          A number of skills to practice and improve your ability to communicate authentically and honestly.

           

          Navigating Everyday Conversations Skills List - DOWNLOAD PDF

          At the Possibility Lab in Mallorca 25-29 October 2016 Georg Pollitt, Nicola Neumann-Mangoldt, and I wanted to support participants practicing their skills for navigating everyday conversations in a rapid learning environment with feedback and coaching first on stage and then in small groups. As we tried to narrow down the options as to which navigation skills would be most important to learn first an entire list of skills emerged, all with the same importance for navigating everyday conversations. We were flustered and disturbed. How could we best deliver the ever-important conversation skills if there were so many and all of them were crucial, yet each skill would take time to develop? We had no answer except to share this list with other Trainers and ask for your ideas. I also think these are perfect skills to practice at Possibility Teams, Possibility Labs, and Trainer Skills Labs.

           

          Navigating Everyday Conversations - DOWNLOAD PDF

          In every conversation there are unlimited opportunities to navigate into Low Drama and use the situation for feeding Gremlin. Often times this is a reciprocal feeding, meaning both people’s Gremlins get fed at the same time through destroying the possibility of intimacy, hurting the other, making insulting jokes, being disgusted by the circumstances, complaining, blaming, making wrong, and so on. Nonetheless, there are equal numbers of ways to create High Drama, to take responsibility, appreciating the other, making decisions, starting things, stopping things, changing things, creating new possibilities, enjoying intimacy in the present moment, and so on. It can be everyday conversations that are most difficult to navigate and most beneficial to navigate.

          Eye Level / Fair - Unfair Conversation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Far Fetching (see also: Back Forecasting)

          becomemagic.mystrikingly.com

          Far Fetching Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

           

          Often we have vague goals that are in alignment with our destiny but they never seem to come to pass, perhaps because we don't know how they could ever come together, perhaps because we think we do not deserve such a thing. Whatever the reason, we can shift into a context of being as-if it has already happened, and then work our way backwards to figure out how we got there.

          Fear (Conscious)

          Horseshoe Feedback Loop - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Coaching is information, feedback, guidance, suggestions, questions, distinctions, wisdom, hints, ideas, and proposals given from one person to another person about how they could create a different future for themselves. Coaching is about creating a different future.

          As Possibilitators, one of our main jobs is to coach our teams to a successful future. We must know how to give coaching and also how to receive and use coaching. This is an exercise in giving and receiving coaching. Knowing what to say is easy. Actually saying it is more difficult because it puts us at risk.

          Go To The Edge

          Goin' Sane

          gounreasonable.mystrikingly.com

          Goin' Sane Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          What is one of the greatest fears of human beings? To be seen as insane, to be rejected by society. What happens to you when you are labeled as being crazy? You will be taken away to an insane asylum, locked up, drugged abused, with no chance
          to get out.

          Gravity (Remembering which direction is down...)

          purposesniffer.mystrikingly.com/

          Remembering Gravity Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          To let people introduce themselves by the purpose, and get focused on the importance of purpose. Here is your first tool: We call it Remembering Gravity. Either gravity is conscious or unconscious. Either our purpose is conscious or unconscious. Before each gesture, the tool is to ask ourselves: Which way is down? What is our purpose?

          Gremlin Reconstruction

          gremlinreconstruction.mystrikingly.com

          December 2019 in Brazil we discovered that some of us completely suppressed our Gremlin to create a 'good boy' or 'nice girl' survival strategy, and almost all of us have suppressed at least some of the more 'dangerous' parts of our Gremlin... parts that are needed to take our authority back, our center back, our feelings back, our real voice back, our energetic tools back, our life back. We discovered a 'Gremlin Reconstruction Process' to identify and re-integrate those lost Gremlin parts. Ready for a life change?

          Coaching is information, feedback, guidance, suggestions, questions, distinctions, wisdom, hints, ideas, and proposals given from one person to another person about how they could create a different future for themselves. Coaching is about creating a different future.

          As Possibilitators, one of our main jobs is to coach our teams to a successful future. We must know how to give coaching and also how to receive and use coaching.           House Cleaning

          radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com

          House Cleaning Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this process is to personally review ones whole life and identify and extract events which stimulate emotional reactions patterns, and take responsibility for having caused them to occur as learning experiences.
          Clearing out other victim stories from events in your life.

          How To Do It

          knowinghow.mystrikingly.com/

          How To Do It - DOWNLOAD PDF

          When considering possibilities, a killer conclusion that often first arises is, “I don’t know how to do it!” This process can make a life context shift so that you can create a new future oriented around doing what matters to you, in other words, being your destiny in action, without first worrying about how to do it.

          Human Hypernetwork Café

          Human hypernetwork Café - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Businesses naturally have many walls that block information, needs and resources from exchanging efficiently. Walls include gender, division, seniority, status, department, project type, level, physical location, language, culture, schedule, technology, etc. Normally there is little interaction across these walls. But most of these walls are virtual and they disappear the instant you try to breach them.

          I Am Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          storyworld.mystrikingly.com

          I Have Changed My Mind

          changeyourmind.mystrikingly.com

          My entire life I've been supporting the capitalist empire by going to school and competing and worrying about money and I have changed my mind about this. I am not longer in the patriarchy. I source another culture. I live in the nomadic nanonation of next culture.

          OR

          I've been a good girl. I've changed my mind. I am actually a Pirate.

          Minds are build to be changed.

          You need anger to change your mind. Say it out loud with a witness. It puts it in the field when another consciousness hears you.

          For changing your self image, your commitment, your context, your purpose, etc.

          Journey Into The Earth

          journeyintotheearth.mystrikingly.com

          Journey Into The Earth - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Journey Into The Mountain (2) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Gaia and the energetic realms of Earth wait for you to bring your authentic questions to them. Earth's gateways are attended by Guardians. Can you locate a Gateway, present your question the Guardian, and bring back the treasure from your Journey? We'll see.

          King Making

          manmaking.mystrikingly.com

          King Making - DOWNLOAD PDF

          'Leadership In A Hierarchy' to 'Spaceholding In A Circle' Shift-Support Initiation

          torustechnology.mystrikingly.com

          Leadership-Circle Shift-Support Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          (Also see: thehierarchy.mystrikingly.com)

          If an organization or gameworld is to be alive as an organism, responding to the needs and pressures both from within its membership and from rapidly changing external circumstances, the way it runs itself will be evolving.

          Humans in groups want to understand their group, and there for do 2 things without thinking about it much. We project unconscious expectations onto those who are directed to space hold and navigate the gameworld that they do what we want and not what we don’t want, and we try to hold the organization solid and unchanging so we think that we understand how it is.

          Neither of these are very helpful, but they are difficult to stop, so the best thing to do is to periodically revisit these concerns in a safely held space and let the projections fall away and let the organizational structure reinvent itself so it can re-enter the present.

          The Leadership-Circle Shift-Support Initiation accomplishes both of these thing marvelously.

          Memetic Construct

          memeticconstruct.mystrikingly.com

          You have built your interface with the world out of Memetic Constructs. By identifying a Memetic Construct your awareness of the pain it creates for you can change what is possible for you in the world.

          Memetic Engineering

          memeticengineering.mystrikingly.com

          Discover your memetic survival strategy that runs you around in internal circles. Your Memetic Constructs may be blocking you from adulthood by keeping you imprisoned in an embryonic survival condition in relationship with the world. Memetic Engineers can precisely identify and distil your core Memetic Construct and create doorways out of prison into much wider internal space... if you want.

          memetics.mystrikingly.com

          Mother Graduation Ceremony

          mothergraduation.mystrikingly.com

          AKA Mom Graduation Ceremony.

          Also, possibly useful for dads... depending on how much matrix the dad has built, and how many initiations the dad has actually gone through to escape the patriarchy. For example, did you get your balls back from your mother yet? Do you own your Gremlin and his Hidden Purposes? Have you jacked-in to your Archetypal Lineage? Otherwise, who are you kidding?
          Also see SPARK 144.

          Mom or Dad Graduation Certificate - DOWNLOAD DOC

          My Core Competences

          possibilitatorskills.mystrikingly.com

          My Core Competences - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Each person during their lives have developed a set of core competences seemingly by accident or coincidence as a side effect of their lives. Often times we don’t recognize the value an application of these talents. This exercise is to use other people’s intelligence to detect one person’s core competences so that person can more consciously put that to use. For example a child learns to survive by being sensitive to the emotional outbursts of a choleric father, gains the talent of being sensitive to other peoples’ feelings, the perfect preparation for a career of helping people.

          Oracle Yourself

          speakfromtheunknown.mystrikingly.com

          Oracle Yourself - DOWNLOAD PDF

          (one of the Torus Technology processes)

          The quality of the listening creates what can be spoken. Oracle Yourself is a parallel-play nonlinear meeting technology that accesses nonlinear group-intelligence through speaking into three different kinds of listening. Oracle Yourself is a powerful tool for creating options, strategies and support for individual, partnership, family, project and group questions. The answers come from you so through answering you become your own Oracle and you actually take a step forward along your path.

          Passion

          livefullout.mystrikingly.com

          Passion - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Learn to be passionate about something. We are trained to live in mediocrity. We have disempowered ourselves and given out passion away so as to act as if we are sane and civilized. Because of this we do not know what we really want. If we do not know what really matters to us, then we do not have desires and wishes. Without desires and wishes we do not have disappointments, BUT we do not have the fire to create.

          Partner Role Exchange

          radicalrelating.mystrikingly.com

          Partner Role Exchange Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The context for it is that each person has a Box and Gremlin, and each Box and Gremlin has a favorite survival strategy that only works when the world is perceived through certain stories if the stories are believed to be true. Since it is extremely difficult to convince a person that they are arranging facts to support Is-Glued stories, and even more difficult to understand why they might be doing so, and...
          Since it is extremely common for partners to search each other out exactly because each one's Gremlin low-drama games can be played out with the other...it turns out to be informative and even transformational to change roles for a bit and to see how your partner sees you.

          Parasitic Entities (see also: Vampire Entities)

          triggerhunter.mystrikingly.com

          demonslayer.mystrikingly.com

          Parasitic Entities - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this process is to eliminate parasitic entities that eat your energy.

          Pegs In My Life

          gapintime.mystrikingly.com

          Pegs In My Life - DOWNLOAD PDF

          • Perception of your Box
          • Identification of behavior patterns, limiting beliefs
          • Detection of emotional topics
          • Distinction between box and being
          • Possibility speaking
          • Release of potential by expanding the Being with stage-work

          “A Possibilitator ignites your capability to live what is waiting to show up through you.” - Clinton Callahan

          Physical Exercises (Possibility Lab)

          alifeofpractice.mystrikingly.com

          Physical Exercises (Possibility Lab) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Pirating Authority

          pirate.mystrikingly.com

          Pirating Authority - DOWNLOAD PDF

          One of the most difficult qualities to call out of a person in a group is the quality of being a responsibly powerful individual. If the person wanted to be a powerful individual why would they be in a group anyway? Pirating authority is done with the gremlin used with responsibility, respect and elegance to serve the space. The action well executed is not personal to the present authority of the space.

          Place of Possibility (or PoP)

          possibility.mystrikingly.com

          Place of Possibility (PoP) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          To liberate massive creativity simultaneously in a large group of human beings in a safe, fun and productive way. Use to ignite and synergize the creative force of individuals in a group field for starting, reorganizing or moving forward projects of a diverse nature simultaneously. Results are depicted in graphic mind maps. Useful for creating unexpected collaborations across a wide variety of endeavors.

          Also see: http://torustechnology.mystrikingly.com

          possibilitylabs.mystrikingly.com

          listenings.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Making

          createpossibility.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Making - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Possibility Making includes being able to hold space, make contact, keep their center, do possibility listening, active listening, possibility speaking, tell magical transformational stories, be unhookable, sell possibility, land distinctions in a space, use agreement, go orthogonal, commit to the other person’s commitment.

          Also see: http://becomepossibility.mystrikingly.com, and http://chairwork.mystrikingly.com.

          Possibility Meeting Format (see also: MeetingTechnology)

          torustechnology.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Meeting Format - DOWNLOAD PDF

          An overview of Possibility Meeting formats in a Possibility Trainer’s toolbox.

          Possibility Process

          possibility.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          "Experience the power of creating possibility."

          This process creates clarity and possibility for individuals about their company, their project, and their personal career. It is based on the following five precepts:
          1) Change occurs through taking responsibility.
          2) Responsibility arises as the natural side effect of consciousness.
          3) Consciousness grows by bringing the background conversation into the foreground.
          4) Conversations are submerged into the background because of assumptions.
          5) We do not need assumptions.

          Possibility Space (see also: Navigating Space)

          navigatespace.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Space: 5 Conditions to Create a Possibility Space - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Possibility Speaking (see also: Speaking)

          speakings.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Speaking - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Possibility Writing (see also: Writing)

          writeyourarticle.mystrikingly.com

          Possibility Writing - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Power

          http://3powers.mystrikingly.com

          Power: Giving and Receiving Power - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Learn how to fight.

           

          Power: Flow Power - DOWNLOAD PDF (in progress)

           

          Power: Fear of Power - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Practice

          http://alifeofpractice.mystrikingly.com

          Practice: Do It Yourself - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Presence

          becomepresent.mystrikingly.com

          Speaking From Presence - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Problems

          problems.mystrikingly.com

          Problems: Soft Ball Exercise - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Problem Is The Solution - DOWNLOAD PDF

          This process uses individual diversity as a tool for changing an organization’s worst problems into guidelines for improvement. Mistakes become intellectual property. Problems become instruction-manuals for better solutions. This process gives every person a voice, brings all factions together on the same team, efficiently produces 3 clear change initiatives with a multitude of linear and nonlinear solutions, and provides a huge lesson in responsibility.
          To bring background conversations into the foreground as a new framework for change making. To produce staff "buy-in" for change. This is a very valuable process. Participants are quite relieved to be able to speak about what has been bothering them for a long time but which in their mind could not be spoken about in public. Trainer holds that we are all in this together and it will be for everyone's benefit to clean this up. Remember, your client is always the organization, never the individuals in the organization.

          Problems Is The Solution (short version) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Projections

          projections.mystrikingly.com

          Projecting and Reacting to Stereotypes - DOWNLOAD PDF

           

          Pull The Rug Out Initiation

          pulltherugout.mystrikingly.com

          Pulling The Rug Out Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Purple Card

          purplecard.mystrikingly.com

          (a Torus Technology circular meeting process)

          Next and Dangerous Questions

          yourquest.mystrikingly.com

        • R

          PM Processes that begin with 'R'.

          Radical Honesty

          radicalhonesty.mystrikingly.com

          Recovering Intimacy

          https://recoverintimacy.mystrikingly.com/

          Relational Sitting

          becomemeditation.mystrikingly.com

          Relational Sitting: Context - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Relational Sitting: Practice - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Relationship Space Cleanout Initiation

          intimacyjourneyers.mystrikingly.com

          Relationship Space Cleanout Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Also see floorprocesses.mystrikingly.com

          Reminding Factor Cards

          remindingfactor.mystrikingly.com

          We want you to be able to take everything from the training with you when you go back to your life on Monday morning. The only way that you can take this with you is to learn to recreate it for yourself ongoingly. You recreate it by using it, by speaking about it, and by sharing what you got with the people you care about.
          We will get to places of clarity and insight this weekend that you will want to be able to return to. This procedure is about making yourself a map with directions for exactly how to get back there. We call the directions Reminding Factors.

          Reminding Factors Cards - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Repackaging

          repackaging.mystrikingly.com

          Sometimes a product will not sell, so the manufacturer recalls the product and designs completely new packaging for it. The new packaging has new artwork, different colors, different shaped box, etc. The box has exactly the same contents, but the repackaging gives a completely new experience to the buyer. Now the buyer can see possibilities which they never saw before. They can see themselves with the product, so they buy it. In this same way, a leader can learn how to Repackage any set of circumstances so his or her team can see advantages and have a common vision to commit to success.

          (The process is written up for an organization, however, a similar process can be offered for a relationship or a family)

          Repackaging: Maps - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Repackaging: Practice - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Repackaging: Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Requesting Recognition

          gameworldconsulting.mystrikingly.com

          Requesting Recognition - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Requesting Recognition permits each participant to check inside of themselves to sense whether or not they have been satisfactorily recognized by the others for what they have done or what they contribute to the gameworld. While they are being recognized they also get to experientially decide when they have been recognized enough. If Requesting Recognition is integrated into the culture of the group, then at any meeting anyone who is feeling like they have not been recognized enough about anything can stand up, explain what they contributed, and ask for the recognition they feel is due. The amazing nonlinear benefit of this process is that it eliminates the basis for the kinds of low dramas where a person harbors secret resentments that others do not recognize them sufficiently and then use their resentment… (Resentment is an unfulfilled expectation. An expectation is an assumption that you have assumed to be true.) …they use their resentment as justification for revenge, sabotage, complaining, or threatening to leave. By using Requesting Recognition that game is over.

          Requiem Process

          requiemprocess.mystrikingly.com

          (a Torus Technology circular meeting process)

          Requiem: Grieving Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Resentment Clearing Initiation

          resentment.mystrikingly.com

          Resentment: Clearing Resentment - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Clearing resentments between a couple / two people so that they can be in the present together and so that love can happen.

          See also: expectations.mystrikingly.com

          Resistance Decision Making

          resistance.mystrikingly.com

          (a Torus Technology circular meeting process)

          Detect and dissolve revenge strategy of the box that blocks your life.

          Rewire Fear (see also: Fear)

          Roadblock to Communication

          completionloop.mystrikingly.com

          Roadblock to Communication - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Role Exchange

          survivalstrategy.mystrikingly.com

          Role Exchange Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The context for it is that each person has a Box and Gremlin, and each Box and Gremlin has a favorite survival strategy that only works when the world is perceived through certain stories if the stories are believed to be true. Since it is extremely difficult to convince a person that they are arranging facts to support Is-Glued stories, and even more difficult to understand why they might be doing so, and...

          (See Partner Role Exchange for this process with a Partner)

          Rumors

          shadowprinciples.mystrikingly.com

          Rumors: Making Rumors Transparent - DOWNLOAD PDF

          S.P.A.R.K. 197 Each time you listen to a Gremlin Rumor without destroying it you become as contaminated as the person who tells it to you.

        • S

          PM Processes that begin with 'S'.

          Safe Space

          holdspace.mystrikingly.com

          Safe Space - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose is to learn how to create and hold an ultra safe space into which people can say anything and it can be heard.

          Say "Stop!"

          saystop.mystrikingly.com

          The purpose this pair or group process is for the Clients to learn and practice saying, "Stop!" and "No!" These words are often not in an uninitiated person's vocabulary. 

          Scanning

          scanning.mystrikingly.com

          Scanning: Four (Five) Body Scan - DOWNLOAD PDF

          School Day Initiation

          healfromschool.mystrikingly.com

          School Day Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          (one of the 51 Core Initiations)

          SCHOOL DAY is an authentic adulthood healing and initiatory process to bring people into radical responsibility and to recover their capabilities after what happened to them at school.

          Also see: Heal From School PLab healfromschool.mystrikingly.com

          Secret Giant Initiation

          SecretGiant Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of the Secret Giant Initiation is:

          • To help you recognize the giant Being you have been withholding from the world secretly inside you in order to survive through modern-culture childhood.
          • To discover that others – even complete strangers – accurately perceive the qualities of your SecretGiant, proving that it is not very secret after-all.
          • To convince you undeniably of the value of your own presence of Being before you do or say anything.
          • To practice explaining your own incredible value with supportive feedback and coaching to help you more effectively source the New Story in the world.
          • To formulate your true profession in New Story terminology.

          Selective Indifference Process

          selectiveindifference.mystrikingly.com

          Selective Indifference Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this process is to recognize that people offer us different choices in communication through their gestures, mime, words and energy. Learn to choose something different than the biggest hook we normally react to.

          Self Denial Process

          gremlinselfcannibalism.mystrikingly.com

          Self Denial Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this process is to reveal what you have been denying to yourself and keeping it secret (maybe even to yourself). Self-denial is living in scarcity. In this process you get to reveal your secrets. You then get a choice to shift into abundance and serve your Bright Principles.

          Also see: gremlinviolence.mystrikingly.com and gremlintransformation.mystrikingly.com

          Self Surgery Initiations

          selfsurgery.mystrikingly.com

          The Self-Surgery website explains what Self-Surgeries are and links to the other websites explaining how to do them.

          Self-Surgeries include:

          - Mind Machines: Mind Machine Bypass - DOWNLOAD PDF

          - Rewire Fear from Control: Rewire Fear Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          - Sewing Brain Splits: Brain Splits Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          - Trust Replacement: Trust Replacement - DOWNLOAD PDF

          NOTE: For these Self Surgeries to work, your Client must be on the New Map of Feelings. In other words, the Client must be able to do Inner Navigation, and have Stellated some of their 4 Feelings.

          Sexual Abuse

          sexualabuse.mystrikingly.com

          After years of research and development there is a series of Possibility Management healing and initiatory processes that complete sexual abuse traumas and move you into solid adulthood.

          Also see: firstposition.mystrikingly.com, rageclub.mystrikingly.com, process.mystrikingly.com and ehpdojo.mystrikingly.com

          Sexual Space Cleanout

          floorprocesses.mystrikingly.com

          (one of the PM Floor Processes)

          Stage Work - Possibility Acting

          possibilityacting.mystrikingly.com

          Creator's Choice Process (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Creepy Man/Creepy Woman Initiation (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Responsibility for Responsibility (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Showtime (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Improvisation theater exercises.

          Start Something (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this Possibility Acting is to be Authentic.

          Also see: becomeauthentic.mystrikingly.com, becomepresent.mystrikingly.com

          Stamp Cashing Initiation

          resentment.mystrikingly.com

          revenge.mystrikingly.com
          justifications.mystrikingly.com

          Stamp Cashing - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Any organization will develop emotional psychic residue over time that begins to interfere with smooth communications and operations of the organization towards fulfilling its purpose. The STAMP CASHING process uses feedback in a unique and safe way to efficiently clean away the residue. Improvement in teamwork is noticed immediately.

          • Liberates attention and energy from potential Low Dramas before they happen.
          • Establishes new beginnings and a new foundation for effectiveness within an organization.
          • Heals incomplete communications and allows people to get into the present.

          Also see: baggage.mystrikingly.com

          Start Something

          becomeauthentic.mystrikingly.com

          Start Something (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this work is to be authentic.

          Also see: becomeauthentic.mystrikingly.com, possibilityacting.mystrikingly.com, and improvise.mystrikingly.com

          Status Transactions

          yourstatus.mystrikingly.com

          Status Transactions (Stage Work) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this practice is to gain more awareness about how we use and are affected by subtle status transactions. To build our muscles of status consciousness so we can change status transactions into conscious theater.

          Stereotypes Initiation

          prejudices.mystrikingly.com

          Projecting and Reacting to Stereotypes - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Also see: baggage.mystrikingly.com

          Story / Proof / Fear Initiation (see also 'I Have A Story About You' Process)

          storyworld.mystrikingly.com

          Story Proof Fear Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          People tend to believe that their own stories are true, about themselves, about what is going on, and particularly about what is possible with other people. The purpose of this initiation is to start building the habit of noticing the small inner tensions that a story creates, then instead of reacting to the story as if it is true and finding ever more proof to support it, you go to the person with whom you have created the story and reveal the story you made up, the proof you have been using, and the inner feeling that powers the whole mechanism, which may up to this point have been unconsciously driving you.

          Study Group Handbook

          studygroup.mystrikingly.com

          Study Group Handbook - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Study Group is a weekly two hour meeting of 3 to 12 people with a spaceholder contexted in Possibility Management. The purpose of Study Group is building matrix. Study Group is more of a discovery journey than a discussion round, more about exploring what we don’t know than defending what we already know. Paragraphs from a book are read out loud and people share their questions, comments and observations from their ongoing experimenting.

          Source of Excitement

          unmixemotions.mystrikingly.com

          Source of Excitement - DOWNLOAD PDF

          System for Sustainability (Regeneration)

          villageseeds.mystrikingly.com

          System for Sustainability (Regeneration) - DOWNLOAD PDF

          This is an archiarchy bridge construction process where participants get to design their lives together as an organization which sustains the context of humans in a circle as an Infinite Solutions Engine.

          Swamp

          swamp.mystrikingly.com

          How to get in. How to get out. But most importantly, what are you doing in there in the first place?

          Also see:

          Mass Swamp Initiation above (in the 'M' section...)

          Swarm Source

          torustechnology.mystrikingly.com

          Swarm Source - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this process is to empower people in a group or a Team to immediately source spontaneous new actions to create new results.

          Also see: yourteams.mystrikingly.com

          Sword Work

          swordofclarity.mystrikingly.com

          Sword Work - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of Sword Work is to become tacitly aware of your energetic Sword Of Clarity and how to use it. This is about taking Radical Responsibility for having and using your energetic sword. This is Possibility Management sword work, not Asian martial arts sword work.

          Also see: swordofclarity.mystrikingly.com, and distinction.mystrikingly.com

        • T-U-V

          PM Processes that begin with 'T', 'U', or 'V'.

          Take Your Center Back From Your Dad

          becomecentered.mystrikingly.com

          Also see: firstposition.mystrikingly.com

          Take Back Your Balls From Your Mom

          balls.mystrikingly.com

          Also see: 8prisons.mystrikingly.com, adulthood.mystrikingly.com, and initiations.mystrikingly.com

          Talking To Mom And Dad Through YOUR Eyes

          adulthood.mystrikingly.com

          8prisons.mystrikingly.com

          Talking To Mom And Dad Through YOUR Eyes - DOWNLOAD PDF

          When we are born we come in looking for something to stand on with both feet, like two foundation stones. The left foot wants to stand on the stone representing our mother and the lineage of the archetypal feminine, and the right foot wants to stand on the stone representing our father and the lineage of the archetypal masculine. We come in seeking to identify with internal experiences that match role models outside of us. The internal experience and the external role models need to match so that we can survive in the culture and times into which we are born. We seek to find an ideal mother or woman and an ideal father or man.

          Tar Baby Process

          tarbabyprocess.mystrikingly.com

          (A Torus Technology circular meeting processes)

          Also see: reactivity.mystrikingly.com

          Telling The New Story

          storyworld.mystrikingly.com

          pointoforigin.mystrikingly.com

          shiftidentity.mystrikingly.com

          Telling The New Story - DOWNLOAD PDF

          This process is to practice telling (sourcing) the new story with feedback and coaching from your team. Two alternate procedures are also offered.

          NOTE: The Wall Initiation is not made available except privately to certified Possibility Lab trainers.

          Three Months For Yourself

          gapintime.mystrikingly.com

          Three Months For Yourself - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this 20 min process is to experience what you always wanted to do for yourself so that you can after that finally serve others.

          Trust Replacement Surgery

          selfsurgery.mystrikingly.com

          Reconnection to your Intuition and Imagination.

          Team Principles And Values

          yourteams.mystrikingly.com

          Team Principles And Values - DOWNLOAD PDF

          To find your team/project principles, values, visions.

          Twin Detachment Initiation

          floorprocesses.mystrikingly.com

          Twin Detachment Initiation - DOWNLOAD PDF

          When a woman gets pregnant it happens very often that two souls incarnate. The purpose of one soul might be to just make sure that the other soul arrives safely on Earth. It is therefore not unusual that it leaves after a certain time. A lot of women don’t realize that they are pregnant with two souls. Yet, the twin that stays has an imprint of the other twin and remembers it. Later in life the remaining twin might have the impression of not being complete, or not having the right to live. To change this energetic imprint it is necessary to cut the energetic cord to the other twin. Here is an example of how the process can go.

          Also see: Birth Process

          Unfolding (Entfaltungs) Initiation

          floorprocesses.mystrikingly.com

          Unfolding - DOWNLOAD PDF

          (One of the PM Floor Processes)

          Unfreeze Your Fear

          consciousfear.mystrikingly.com

          Unfreezing your fear will have the effect of releasing feelings, and especially fear, that are entrapped in your bodies. This means that you will feel more Fear than you could feel before. You can only successfully go through this process if you have shifted from the Old Thoughtmap of Fear to the New Thoughtmap of Fear where Fear is a neutral sensation which provides information and energy for your life and Destiny.

          Unfreeze Your Fear - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Unhookable (Become)

          becomeunhookable.mystrikingly.com

          Unhookable Exercises - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Unhookable: Tools for Staying Unhookable - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Unmix Emotions

          unmixemotions.mystrikingly.com

          Also see: 4feelings.mystrikingly.com and 4emotions.mystrikingly.com

          Unreasonable Request - What's The Block?

          gounreasonable.mystrikingly.com

          Unreasonable Request - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Learn to make unreasonable requests of people to help you deliver your destiny and they deliver theirs. What’s the block stopping you from being unreasonable.

          Values And Successes

          values.mystrikingly.com

          Values And Successes Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Discover the personal causal connection between your Values and your Successes (where 'success' is defined by the values of a culture which you have conscious or unconscious accepted as your own).

          Vampire Entities

          triggerhunter.mystrikingly.com

          demonslayer.mystrikingly.com

          reactivity.mystrikingly.com

          SPARK 135 - DOWNLOAD PDF

          This S.P.A.R.K. is the write-up of the process of Becoming a Trigger-Hunter.

          Did you ever notice how, even after years of personal development work, getting okay with your parents, taking responsibility for your life, learning to be centered, observing yourself, etc., there are still periods when you feel exhausted, cranky, depressed, overwhelmed, or resentful, seemingly for no reason at all? You may think that if you could just solve some vague problem these states would go away. But they don’t. Did you ever have that?

          This S.P.A.R.K. suggests that perhaps these states do not originate in a childhood trauma which will vanish if treated with psychology, drugs, beer, or one more workshop. Maybe something entirely different is at work here, something about which modern culture offers few useful distinctions.

          Victim and Responsible Story

          radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com

          NOTE: The Victim and Responsible Story initiation is not made available except privately to certified Expand The Box trainers.

        • W-X-Y-Z

          PM Processes that begin with 'W', 'X', 'Y', or 'Z'.

          Waking State

          wakingstate.mystrikingly.com

          The Waking State - DOWNLOAD PDF

          weaponsonthetable.mystrikingly.com

          (a Torus Technology circular meeting process)

           

          What Evil Initiation

          3worlds.mystrikingly.com

          What Evil - DOWNLOAD PDF

          The purpose of this exercise is to become aware of other peoples underworld and learn to see it. Get clear and direct feedback on own underworld.

          Where Are We Now Process

          whatnow.mystrikingly.com

          Where Are We Now Process - DOWNLOAD PDF

          (Group process)

          This is an alchemical process in which an organization is being transformed into being more actualized to present and near future conditions.

          WHERE ARE WE NOW originates out of an authentic question of a key person in the organization. It can be more personal or more organization oriented, but the question needs to be the likes of: Where are we now? What is next for us? Where are we going? How do we get there? Who will take us there?

          Who Are You Being?

          parts.mystrikingly.com

          Who Are You Being? - DOWNLOAD PDF

          To bring into the conversation of the training the possibility that a person can observe who they are being in any given situation, thus giving them the possibility of shifting who they are being.

          Also see: beingyourself.mystrikingly.com

          expectations.mystrikingly.com

          X and U Initiation (Personal)

          from the work of Amy and Arnold Mindell

          X and U Initiation Personal - DOWNLOAD PDF

          Yes And... Initiation

          improvise.mystrikingly.com

          Yes And... - DOWNLOAD PDF

          This exercise has the purpose to become aware of the impact of saying NO when having a big being and instead being a Yes an keeping the energy rolling.

          Your Magical Power Initiation

          magetraining.mystrikingly.com

          Invented by Anne-Chloé Destremau, who is 'busily' writing this up (as one of her Magical Powers...) with Brianne Vaillancourt. Please ask them for details.

          Groups of 4.

          Review website Become Magic.

          3 people have their Sword Of Clarity at the 4th person's neck.

          The person starts completing the sentence: "If I admitted my magic I would prove it by ___________."

          Each person has nonlinear unreasonable magical powers (comparable to a knack...) that are distilled and consciously practiced as delivering Value during this process. This requires a total Commitment to each person.

          List: What Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) will it take for you to bring this magical power into service for the Team?

          List: What are your fears about doing each of these EHP?

          List: What Experiments could you do to change your relationship to each of these fears?

          "...et, Voila!"

        Create a site with
        This website is built with Strikingly.
        Create yours today!

        This website is built with Strikingly.

        Create your FREE website today!

          Cookie Use
          We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More
          Accept all
          Settings
          Decline All
          ×
          What Are Cookies?

          Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

          Our Cookies

          When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

          In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

          Third-Party cookies

          In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

          How To Disable Cookies?

          Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

          Cookie Use
          We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
